description: REQ-017 specifies the pipeline must conform to the canonical CaptureAutoSave type: (deps: CaptureDeps) => (state: EditingState, trigger) => Promise<Result<NoteFileSaved, SaveError>>. The implementation defines its own CaptureAutoSavePorts type that diverges from canonical CaptureDeps (ports.ts). CaptureAutoSavePorts includes writeFileAtomic, vaultPath, getCurrentNote, getPreviousFrontmatter, and noteIsEmpty -- none of which exist in canonical CaptureDeps. Conversely, canonical CaptureDeps includes allocateNoteId and clipboardWrite which are absent from CaptureAutoSavePorts. The implementation does not accept CaptureDeps as specified.
